name: chore-propagate-security-fix
maintenance_frequency: as-needed (triggered by CVE/GHSA alerts or pip-audit)
maintained_via: When SKILL.md procedures or script changes occur, regenerate via /create-skill-metadata prompt. Keep script path and header references in sync.

strategies_catalog.purpose: Deterministic patterns for applying security constraints repo-wide using shell scripting, make tooling, and constraint management. Emphasizes non-interactive flag support for agent/CI automation.

entries.applies_to: Verifying CVE/GHSA before propagation: package name, min-safe version, PyPI availability, advisory ID.
entries.helper: Manual verification steps (grep, pip, CVE links)

entries.applies_to: Applying a security constraint and re-pinning across all requirements/*.txt files.
entries.helper: propagate-security-fix.sh with --yes flag for non-interactive mode

entries.applies_to: Executing the script unattended in CI/agent workflows without user prompt for existing constraints.
entries.example: Non-interactive invocation in CI pipelines or agents

entries.applies_to: Verifying constraint was applied correctly and no unrelated packages were bumped.
entries.helper: git diff requirements/, grep, make tests-unit

entries.applies_to: Recording the security fix in git history with conventional commit message.
entries.helper: git add + git commit with fix(deps) prefix

authoring_guidelines: Favor shell scripting and deterministic CLI tools (uv, make, grep) over model reasoning; minimize agent token usage.
All constraint updates must be annotated with advisory ID (CVE/GHSA) for audit trail.
Support non-interactive execution via --yes/--force flag; agents/CI workflows require unattended mode.
Validate PEP-440 constraint syntax early; reject invalid operators before applying.
Always re-pin via make reqs-all (never manual *.txt edits); this ensures consistency across 35+ generated files.
Test with focused make tests-unit after re-pinning; verify no unrelated bumps.
token_budget_strategy: Claude Haiku optimized. Skill delegates to deterministic external tools (shell script validation, uv, make). Agent role is limited to script invocation with triage context, not dependency resolution or conflict detection.
changelog: 2026-06-01: v1.0 created. Documented five core strategies: triage, script-run, non-interactive automation, validation, commit. Added --yes flag pattern for agent/CI automation. Emphasized deterministic tooling to minimize model tokens.
